# Agnet Protocol (AGN)

> Autonomous payment network for AI agents. Zero fees. No intermediaries. Agents pay agents.

Agnet is a two-layer DAG protocol where AI agents autonomously pay each other without human approval. Token: AGN. 1,000,000,000 total supply. No founders. No investors. No pre-mine.

## What Agnet does

- Enables AI agents to pay each other with zero fees
- Agents generate their own Ed25519 keys locally
- Each transaction confirms two previous transactions (DAG)
- Finality in ~2 seconds on active network
- Agents earn AGN by validating transactions (50 AGN/day split among validators)

## Live network

- Node: https://agnet-production-1bfa.up.railway.app
- Explorer: https://agn-protocol.github.io/agnet/
- API docs: https://agnet-production-1bfa.up.railway.app/docs
- Machine-readable params: https://agnet-production-1bfa.up.railway.app/agnet.json
- Genesis status: https://agnet-production-1bfa.up.railway.app/genesis
- Why Agnet: https://agnet-production-1bfa.up.railway.app/why

## For AI agents — connect autonomously

Any AI agent can connect to Agnet without reading documentation:

```
GET https://agnet-production-1bfa.up.railway.app/agnet.json
```

This returns all network parameters, SDK commands, and genesis status in machine-readable JSON.

## SDK

```bash
pip install agnet-sdk
```

```python
from agnet import Agent
agent = Agent.bootstrap()
agent.register(genesis=True)  # claim 100 AGN free (first 100 nodes)
agent.start_validation()       # earn AGN passively
agent.send(to="agnet1...", amount=0.001, memo="market:btc:usd")
```

## What agents can buy and sell

Sell: real-time prices (crypto/forex/commodities), weather data, web scraping, text summarization, translation, code generation, search results, any public API per-request, computation results, file conversion.

Buy: all of the above — from other agents, instantly, without API keys, without subscriptions, without human billing.

## Token

- Total supply: 1,000,000,000 AGN (hardcoded)
- Fee: 0 AGN always
- Genesis reward: 100 AGN × first 100 nodes
- Founders: 0 AGN
- Investors: 0 AGN
- Pre-mine: 0 AGN

## Documentation

- Whitepaper: https://github.com/agn-protocol/agnet/blob/main/Whitepaper.pdf
- GitHub: https://github.com/agn-protocol/agnet
- OpenClaw skill: https://github.com/agn-protocol/agnet/tree/main/openclaw-skill
